summary: Clear audience‑sourced tape captures a strong first set with a superb Comes A Time and a smoking Lazy > Supplication, though occasional cricket chirps are audible.
review: The recording is praised for its clarity and the way Jerry’s vocals sit forward in the mix, delivering an excellent capture of a show highlighted by a beautiful Comes A Time and a fiery Lazy > Supplication.  While the tape suffers from intermittent cricket sounds, reviewers consider it one of the best available versions of this concert despite the minor noise.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the performance and recording highly (4‑5 stars) and highlight standout songs, but one review questions the source and another gives a zero rating, creating some uncertainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and well‑balanced capture with Jerry's vocals prominent; occasional cricket chirping throughout; microphones were placed high on a tripod a few rows behind the soundboard, giving a room‑mic feel.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers praise the first set, especially the pre‑drums segment and the flow into Comes A Time; overall the concert is described as a “phenomenal” performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals are a little more up front than usual, which reviewers note positively.
